codeReview.summary: The intended flaky-test fix in sd-core/src/dynamics.rs is correct (threshold relaxed to 500ms with rationale), but the same commit also changes existing assertions in sd-core/src/events.rs, which is explicitly off-limits for this mission and outside the requested feature scope.

issues.description: Commit a749c6c modifies existing test assertions in events tests (e.g., added asserts at lines 1084 and 1442-1444) even though mission AGENTS.md marks this as off-limits ("Do not modify existing test assertions"). This scope violation must be reverted or split out of the feature commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission boundaries explicitly prohibit modifying existing test assertions, but this still happened in the completed feature commit, suggesting enforcement is weak.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 9: "Off-limits: Do not modify existing test assertions"; commit a749c6c changes events test assertions at sd-core/src/events.rs:1084 and 1442-1444.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker procedure is strict (TDD RED->GREEN and additional manual verification steps), but this hotfix workflow did not follow those steps while handoff.skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 6f33ead3-f61b-428e-a15f-1630cb6dad46 shows no RED test-writing step and no cargo doc/fmt-check step from SKILL.md section 3/6; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.

summary: Review failed due to a blocking scope/convention violation: the feature correctly relaxes the flaky performance threshold but also alters unrelated existing test assertions that were explicitly off-limits for this mission.
